name: obsidian-journal
description: 黑曜石日志 - 个人博客平台 (Block 编辑器 + 14 model 数据模型)

scripts.test:integration: tsx tests/integration/repo.test.mts && tsx tests/integration/search.test.mts && tsx tests/integration/auth.test.mts && tsx tests/integration/posts.test.mts
scripts.coverage:check: c8 --reporter=text --include='lib/**' --exclude='node_modules/**' --check-coverage --lines=75 --functions=75 --branches=70 --statements=75 npm run test:unit && c8 --reporter=text --include='lib/**' --exclude='node_modules/**' --check-coverage --lines=75 --functions=75 --branches=70 --statements=75 npm run test:integration
scripts.verify: npm run typecheck && npm run lint && npm run test
scripts.verify:fast: npm run typecheck && npm run lint && npm run test:unit && npm run test:integration
scripts.verify:full: npm run verify:fast && npm run test:e2e && npm run test:visual
